name: adversarial-review
description: NodeJS multi-tool adversarial review gate. Installs a SessionStart baseline hook and a Stop gate hook for Claude Code. Supports multiple host tools (Claude Code, Codex, opencode) with configurable reviewer mappings, policy modes (soft/enforced/strict-ci), and native or wrapper enforcement. The native gate is advisory: it suggests which changed files to review (with reasons) and lets the coding agent decide to self-review or skip; detected secrets still hard-block.
